title: Rip_Dead Site migrated to VoidUI 1.0
content: The site has been fully upgraded to VoidUI 1.0. This includes animated transitions, glow UI, JSON-based systems, and a modular structure that removes the need for editing multiple HTML pages manually. Everything is now centralized into a scalable engine. This site has also became open-source so that people can fork the repository and make edits (Do NOT forget to credit me)

title: Updated Domain
content: Instead of ripdead.giize.com, the domain got updated to ripdead.kozow.com
